use_cases: Audio playback controls for music streaming web applications
Podcast episode player with progress tracking and time display
Background music player for productivity or focus applications
Audio preview player for music marketplaces or sample libraries
Interactive audio player for educational content or training platforms
ai_summary: A functional music player component featuring playback controls including play/pause, skip forward/back, shuffle, and repeat modes. The component includes a progress bar with visual feedback, time tracking display, and customizable props for album art, song title, artist name, and audio source. Built with framer-motion for smooth animations and uses standard HTML5 audio for media playback.
